prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `320afe60`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: each blue object is moved horizontally until its bounding box is flush with an edge, keeping the same rows and exact shape. Objects whose bounding box is incomplete on exactly one side move right and turn green; all others move left and turn red.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the Sonnet hint because it incorrectly tied the rule to global/top-vs-bottom placement; the corrected note is in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_320afe60/notes.md#L1). The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_320afe60/verifier.py#L4) counts which bounding-box sides have gaps, and the generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_320afe60/generator.py#L19) builds the same family with small boxy connected shapes, interior holes, single-side notches, and occasional multi-side openings on 22-row yellow grids. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_320afe60/__init__.py#L1). No new primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Validation passed end to end: `arc2.shared.verify` passed `5/5` official examples, the shared builder produced 1000 examples, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 320afe60` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/320afe60/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/320afe60/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/320afe60/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/320afe60/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/320afe60/previews/preview_03.png).
